qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_dictado as ID, t.c_dictado as CODE, t.d_dictado as TEXT, t.oi_curso as PID, SEC.policy FROM CYD02_DICTADOS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Capacitacion.Dictados.DICTADO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_dictado LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_dictado={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID} AND t.c_estado = \'P\' ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_curso as ID, t.c_curso as CODE, t.d_curso as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM CYD01_CURSOS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Capacitacion.Cursos.CURSO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_curso LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_curso={#SOURCE:@PID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_curso as ID, t.c_curso as CODE, t.d_curso as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM CYD01_CURSOS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Capacitacion.Cursos.CURSO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_curso LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.c_curso={substring_before(#INDOC:@CODE,\'-\')} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_dictado as ID, t.c_dictado as CODE, t.d_dictado as TEXT, t.oi_curso as PID, SEC.policy FROM CYD02_DICTADOS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Capacitacion.Dictados.DICTADO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_dictado LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.c_dictado={substring_before(#SOURCE:@SUB_SEARCH,\'-\')} AND t.oi_curso={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} AND t.c_estado = \'P\' ORDER BY CODE asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_curso as ID, t.c_curso as CODE, t.d_curso as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM CYD01_CURSOS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Capacitacion.Cursos.CURSO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_curso LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_curso={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_dictado as ID, t.c_dictado as CODE, t.d_dictado as TEXT, t.oi_curso as PID, SEC.policy FROM CYD02_DICTADOS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Capacitacion.Dictados.DICTADO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_dictado LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_curso={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} AND t.c_estado = \'P\' ORDER BY CODE asc ')/ROWS/ROW
